metadata.description: Optional. A unique application/solution name for all resources in this deployment. This should be 3-16 characters long.

Optional. A unique text value for the solution. This is used to ensure resource names are unique for global resources. Defaults to a 5-character substring of the unique string generated from the subscription ID, resource group name, and solution name.

Required. Azure region for all services. Regions are restricted to guarantee compatibility with paired regions and replica locations for data redundancy and failover scenarios based on articles [Azure regions list](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/reliability/regions-list) and [Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server - Azure Regions](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/postgresql/flexible-server/overview#azure-regions). Note: In the "Deploy to Azure" interface, you will see both "Region" and "Location" fields - "Region" is only for deployment metadata while "Location" (this parameter) determines where your actual resources are deployed.
Optional. Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID.
Optional. The pricing tier for the App Service plan.
Optional. The type of database to deploy (cosmos or postgres).
Optional. Use semantic search.
Optional. Semantic search config.
Optional. Is the index prechunked.
Optional. Top K results.
Optional. Enable in domain.
Optional. Id columns.
Optional. Content columns.
Optional. Vector columns.
Optional. Filename column.
Optional. Search filter.
Optional. Title column.
Optional. Metadata column.
Optional. Source column.
Optional. Text column.
Optional. Layout Text column.
Optional. Chunk column.
Optional. Offset column.
Optional. Url column.
Optional. Whether to use Azure Search Integrated Vectorization. If the database type is PostgreSQL, set this to false.
Optional. Name of Azure OpenAI Resource SKU.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Model Deployment Name.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Model Name.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Model Version.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Model Capacity - See here for more info  https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/how-to/quota.
Optional. Whether to enable the use of a vision LLM and Computer Vision for embedding images. If the database type is PostgreSQL, set this to false.
Optional. The maximum number of images to pass to the vision model in a single request.

Optional. Orchestration strategy: openai_function or semantic_kernel or langchain str. If you use a old version of turbo (0301), please select langchain. If the database type is PostgreSQL, set this to sementic_kernel.
Optional. Chat conversation type: custom or byod. If the database type is PostgreSQL, set this to custom.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Temperature.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Top P.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Max Tokens.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Stop Sequence.

azureOpenAISystemMessage.defaultValue: You are an AI assistant that helps people find information.

metadata.description: Optional. Azure OpenAI System Message.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Api Version.
Optional. Whether or not to stream responses from Azure OpenAI.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Embedding Model Deployment Name.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Embedding Model Name.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Embedding Model Version.
Optional. Azure OpenAI Embedding Model Capacity - See here for more info https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/how-to/quota .
Optional. Name of Computer Vision Resource SKU (if useAdvancedImageProcessing=true).
Optional. Location of Computer Vision Resource (if useAdvancedImageProcessing=true).
Optional. Azure Computer Vision Vectorize Image API Version.
Optional. Azure Computer Vision Vectorize Image Model Version.

Optional. Azure Search vector field dimensions. Must match the embedding model dimensions. 1536 for text-embedding-3-small, 3072 for text-embedding-3-large. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/search/cognitive-search-skill-azure-openai-embedding#supported-dimensions-by-modelname.(Only for databaseType=CosmosDB)
Optional. The SKU of the search service you want to create. E.g. free or standard.
Optional. Azure AI Search Conversation Log Index.
Optional. Principal object for user or service principal to assign application roles. Format: {"id":"<object-id>", "name":"<name-or-upn>", "type":"User|Group|ServicePrincipal"}
Optional. Application Environment.
Optional. Hosting model for the web apps. This value is fixed as "container", which uses prebuilt containers for faster deployment.

Optional. The log level for application logging. This setting controls the verbosity of logs emitted by the application. Allowed values are CRITICAL, ERROR, WARN, INFO, and DEBUG. The default value is INFO.

Optional. List of comma-separated languages to recognize from the speech input. Supported languages are listed here: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/speech-service/language-support?tabs=stt#supported-languages.
Optional. The tags to apply to all deployed Azure resources.

Optional. Enable monitoring applicable resources, aligned with the Well Architected Framework recommendations. This setting enables Application Insights and Log Analytics and configures all the resources applicable resources to send logs. Defaults to false.
Optional. Image version tag to use.
OpenAI and Semantic Kernel prompt values.
Optional. Created by user name.
